titleStmt.title: SII 40.255: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 255. (A.R. No. B. 300 of 1933.) Mādala, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up in the compound of the Sakalēśvarasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1074 (aṁbudhi-śaila-kh-ēṁdu), Paushya, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṅkramaṇa.
Records the gift of land for burning a perpetual lamp at Māmaṁḍala by Chāma, a minister, son of Pōtireddi and Kōmaṭāṁba of Kāśyapa-gōtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta vastu kavi saṁstavanīya viśē
ṣa puṇyalakṣmīstanaratna bhūṣaṇuṁḍu mitrasarō
ja sarōja mitruṁḍabhyasta kalākalāpuṁḍu
nīrasta kalākūta śaṁkara kramanyasta manūṁbujuṁ
ḍa vinayāḍhyuṇḍu raṭṭaḍi kāmaṇḍunnatini . celuva
nu savvasasyamulaṁjēṁgloṟunāṁṭaṁ braśastamainnaiṁUṁgā
lanugrapōla cihnamulaṁ gūḍaṁganaṁdhra mahītalaṁ
bu lōpalanadhikāramaṁdadadhivāluda cētakula
kramāgataṁbulu gadastaraṁbaḍi sibhūnuta kasyapagō
traratnamai . Anupama yājñavalkikulahamya daśākuṁ
ḍunaina Iṭṭi kōmana kīramāsa mānayabhīmāni dayānvita
dhanyamānyaya ṁdu caritra sidisamāṁbikakuṁ brabhavi
cenaṁśava¨rddhanuṁḍagu pōtiraḍḍi vibudha prakara praṇutāṁdhra
vinaya vibhūṣaṇuṁḍunu bavitra caritruṁ
ḍunaina raḍḍi pōtanaki kulāmaṁbudhi sudhākarulīla
yanuṁ kōmatāṁbakunu vīmala kī¨rttivilā
suṇḍu cāmisajjananidhimudbhaviṁciri pu sthana
coḍiyu goṁka bhūmi nī . Atīśayabhaktiṁgō
civā¨rgramai sukaviṁdra gāyaka pratītikavabhīṣṭavastu
vula sāramulicci yanēka dha¨rmmamulu tama¨rddhimi śrī
yulla sadguṇānvituṁḍai maṁtri
cāmadharaṇīṁdra guṇipriyaputruna ṁḍai . pīṭha
dmakulanistārakuṁḍai mēruśailasāruṁ cāpa
samanvitu suvicā ḍai maṁtri cāminu svaranēla
Aṁbudi śaila khēṁddu mita śakābdamulōni pauṣya
māsaṁbunanuttarāyaṇamu saṁkramaṇaṁbuna maṁtri
cāmi bālaṁbaku pōli māmaṁḍalayanu purini
nakhaṁḍava¨rtidīpa na ttarōttara bhāsura
paṁbu śaili nāgāṁbanē kaśākī
śrīlanitōtanūvāmuna
bhāsi lalō
lines are damaged
Digital edition of SII 40.255 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
